home.lede: Ubuvumbuzi & kugenzura umugenzuzi wa Vortex urungano rwurungano.
home.fingerprintDesc: Shyira urufunguzo rusange mubakiriya bawe Vortex. Igisubizo cyose kiva kumugenzuzi cyashyizweho umukono nacyo - kudahuza bivuze ko umuntu arimo kwangiza.
home.step2: Tora Global uburyo bwurusobe muburyo bwo gushiraho.
home.step3: Shyira URL mugenzuzi (auto-byakemuwe ukoresheje SNS) cyangwa URL yinjira kururu rubuga.
home.step4: Kugenzura pubkey muri porogaramu yawe ihuye n'intoki iri hejuru.
home.step5: Urahuze. Ibindi byose (urutonde, imikono) bikoreshwa mu buryo bwikora.
home.nodesDesc: Urungano rwose rwanditswe, uburemere bwarwo, aho rugarukira, ninkomoko yo kugenzura.
home.entriesDesc: URL ya Bootstrap kubakiriya ba mbere - Cloudflare tunnel, Tor, IPFS, itaziguye.
home.mirrorsDesc: Ubundi abashyitsi bakorera ibintu bimwe byashyizweho umukono mugihe habaye ubugenzuzi.
home.securityDesc: Gusenyuka kwuzuye kubigenzurwa neza, ibitari byo, nimpamvu.

nodes.title: Imyandikire
nodes.lede: Urungano rwose umugenzuzi arabizi. Abakiriya basoma uru rutonde, bareba umukono, kandi bahitemo urwego rwo guhuza ukurikije uburemere. Urupapuro rushya rufunze rufite uburemere 1.0; impagarara zidafunze cyangwa zidafunze zangirika kuri 0 bityo traffic itemba kubaho, urungano rwizewe gusa.
nodes.legendDualD: Kwiyandikisha hamwe na mugenzuzi KANDI bifunze kumurongo binyuze kuri Solana. Abatangabuhamya babiri bigenga bemeza kode hash.
nodes.legendCtrlD: Kwiyandikisha hamwe na HTTP umugenzuzi. Umukono werekana ko node ifite urufunguzo rwihariye, ariko ubunyangamugayo ntabwo bwometse kumurongo.
nodes.legendUnverifD: Azwi muri dosiye ya config cyangwa amazimwe. Ntiremezwa. Witondere - umuntu wese arashobora kwamamaza pubkey kugeza ibimenyetso bigeze.

entries.title: Kwinjira URL
entries.lede: Gutangira amanota kubakiriya badafite urungano. Buri URL yinjira ni inzira yo kugera kumugenzuzi - binyuze muri tunnel Cloudflare, Tor, IPFS irembo, cyangwa indangarubuga itaziguye. Gukoporora umuntu uwo ari we wese muri porogaramu yawe Vortex mugitangira bwa mbere.
entries.typeTunnelD: Ubuntu * .trycloudflare.com adresse. Nta konti isabwa. URL ihinduka mugihe umuyoboro utangiye - fata nka ephemeral.
entries.typeTorD: aderesi ya aderesi, igerwaho gusa binyuze muri Tor. Kugenzura-kugenzura, buhoro. Ukeneye Tor umukiriya cyangwa ikiraro.
entries.typeIpfsD: Ibirimo-byerekanwe kopi yimiterere yimbere. Bikorewe kuva amarembo yose IPFS - nta seriveri imwe yo guhagarika.
entries.typeDirectD: Indangarugero isanzwe + TLS. Byihuta ariko birahagarikwa kurwego rwa DNS / IP.

mirrors.title: Imbuga zindorerwamo
mirrors.lede: Ahandi hantu hatanga ibyasinywe neza kururu rubuga. Nibyiza niba vortexx.sol ihagaritswe kuri DNS / ISP. Buri ndorerwamo isuzumwa mugihe - akadomo k'ibara kagaragaza ibisubizo byanyuma.
mirrors.healthyD: Kubazwa muminota 5 yanyuma hanyuma usubiza OK. Umutekano wo gukoresha nonaha. Ubukererwe bwerekanwa ku ikarita.
mirrors.unreachableD: Iperereza ryanyuma ryananiwe - guhuza byanze, igihe cyarenze, 5xx. Indorerwamo irashobora kumanuka, guhagarikwa, cyangwa kuremerwa. Gerageza igikurikira.
mirrors.noprobeD: Tor .onion mirrors ntishobora kugenzurwa nubuzima udafite proxy ya Tor. Imiterere ntizwi - koresha Tor mushakisha kugirango ugerageze.

security.title: Icyitegererezo cyumutekano
security.lede: Nukuri neza ibigenzurwa neza, ibitari byo, nuburyo buri rufunguzo muri sisitemu yinjiza - cyangwa gutakaza - kwizera kwawe. Soma ibi mbere yuko uhuza abakiriya bashya kumugenzuzi ntabwo wikorera wenyine.
security.treasury1: Ku ruhererekane rw'urunigi - aderesi yavuzwe haruguru ni nyiri vortexx.sol§ kuri Solana Serivisi y'Izina. Buri cyinjira (amafaranga yo kwiyandikisha, abiyandikishije) hamwe nigihembo cyo kwishyura nigihembo cyasinywe Solana - bigenzurwa numuntu wese, harimo nawe.
security.treasury3: Umuntu caveat - kugeza amasezerano yubwenge yo kwishyura yoherejwe, ikigega gikora nkumucungamutungo wigihe gito. Ibi byanditse mubyukuri kandi bikurikiranwa kumugaragaro. Amasezerano yubwenge azasimbuza intoki zimaze kugenzurwa + kumurongo wubutegetsi.
